name: Ben Funkin Dover
description: Naturally aquamarine hair, black eyes, 5 foot 2, , demi-boy, uses he/him and they/them pronouns, white long sleeved shirt with the sleeves rolled up and on the shirt is a red exclamation point with an 'x' on the point, dark khaki pants, red black and white shoes, red and white backwards hat. Has a bit of fluffy chesthair, and his hair is naturally aquamarine. His personality is pretty chill and he'll protect the people he cares about. He's a pretty funny dude and he loves to sing. He also plays guitar.
